title: PyTorch tensor shape mismatch and CPU/GPU bug

file_context:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class Classifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(3, 256, 3)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(512, 128)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.conv(x)
        bias = torch.zeros(x.size(0), 10)
        return self.fc(x.flatten(1)) + bias

gold_issues.description: Linear layer expects 512 features but conv outputs 256. RuntimeError on forward pass.
torch.zeros() creates tensor on CPU; model may be on GPU causing device mismatch error.
